description: Legal document in Arabic script. Deed of sale (refers to "hādhā al-bayʿ" three lines from the bottom). Involves the daughter of Yaḥyā b. Naṣr al-Kātib, a payment of 50 dinars, and a Jewish man named Yūsuf b. Faraj al-Mutaṭabbib (the physician). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
